title: Research Associate I
description: Johns Hopkins Medicine is seeking a Research Associate I to support groundbreaking clinical and translational research. You'll assist with patient recruitment, data collection, and regulatory documentation. Work onsite in Philadelphia at a world-renowned academic medical center advancing medical knowledge.
responsibilities: Recruit and screen study participants according to protocol criteria
Collect biological samples and clinical data with attention to quality
Maintain detailed research records and ensure regulatory compliance
Support patient follow-up appointments and retention efforts
Assist with study reporting and data quality reviews

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Healthcare, or related field
skills: Strong attention to detail and accuracy
Knowledge of GCP and research ethics
certifications: CITI Human Subjects Research certification (or eligible)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits
Research publication and career development opportunities
On-site Johns Hopkins facilities and resources
